name: arscontexta
description: Claude Code plugin that generates individualized knowledge systems from conversation. You describe how you think and work, have a conversation and get a complete second brain as markdown files you own.

findings_summary.notes: Organization (agenticnotetaking) repository with 1,879 stars. MIT license is OSI-approved and permissive. No SECURITY.md present. Shell-based plugin, not archived, not a fork. Actively maintained (last updated 2026-02-25). CAUTION: Repository was created very recently (2026-02-15, only 10 days old) which warrants heightened scrutiny. Despite rapid star acquisition, the extreme recency means it lacks a track record. Shell-based implementation executes scripts on the host system. The repo structure includes hooks, generators, and agents that run shell commands. Rapid star growth combined with very new creation date is a pattern that can indicate astroturfing.
